[{'sticker_id': 18, 'sticker_name': '“It could get very messy,” he said and slipped his finger from my mouth and set to caressing my neck, lowering his mouth to my ear, feathering kisses there.

“And I’m the best friend.”
“And if we do something like this, we’ll have to take it to the grave, despite the birthdays and Christmases and Thanksgivings we’ll be sharing. Because we both know this is—” I was putting it out there. And it was probably for the best if we were going to ride this bullet train to his bedroom.
'}, {'sticker_id': 18, 'sticker_name': 'He didn’t rush me, didn’t ask me to finish that thought. We’re two people caught up in the emotion of the day, not to mention the vodka of the day, and tomorrow, we’ll go back to the way things were before.”

“You mean you pretending to hate me, and me pretending not to love your little act?”

I startled. “That’s not how it is.”

#RachelStarkie #newrelease
 BLOODRITE: Grace Unchained
 
 *BLURB*
 *Will they be the key to her survival?*
 
 Having survived horrors, Grace Ngarra is alone. A broken beauty whose only hope is to find sanctuary. To escape enslavement, she must appeal to those who have no reason to care.
 *The Paranormal Council.*
 
 Will they protect her? Letting Grace find herself, peace, and a life of free will or will they believe the lies and send her back to captivity and torment?
 
 Author’s Note:
 Grace Unchained is the 1st in a Fantasy slow burn with dark themes referenced and on the page. The romance is subtle, and the story has a strong theme of survival, finding a way to love, not just others but also oneself.
 Grab Grace Unchained on the Zon-

video_description: Siobhan - I was raised to believe I was special, a jewel, all because of simple trick of genetics.  I am an omega.  As such, my life was mapped out from birth - mate an alpha of good family, have his children, keep his home - until my future was snatched away from me.  Against all odds, I've built a life for myself in a society that now tells me I am worthless.  As an unmated omega, my options are limited, but I can no longer afford to accept those limits.  Then, an alpha walks into my life - an alpha the old me used to dream about - and he has the money to make my dreams come true.  But what will he want in return?  Damian - I am everything society expects an alpha to be: rich, handsome, and successful.  I want nothing more than to adopt my newly-orphaned nephew, but the courts say that a lone alpha is too rough to be a caregiver.  I need a mate, someone softer, someone fit to raise a child, someone to help me fake it just long enough to get custody.  It'll take a miracle.  What I need an omega who doesn't want a mate.  I never expected to meet her in a nightclub... #tabithacattbooks #booktok #pageflip #pageflips #pageflipping  #indiebooktok #indiebooks #spicybooktok #spicyrecs #spicybookrecs #spicybooks #spicyreads #indiepublishing #indieauthor #Wattpadrecommendations #wattpad #indieauthor #omegaversereads #omegaversebooks #omegaverse #omegaverseromance #contemporaryromancereads #contemporaryromancebooks

voice_to_text: Okay, let's talk about this comment right here, because nobody has said it, but page flipping videos are actually really hard to record. Also, please ignore the fly that is bothering me right now. And since they are so common on Booktok, you pretty much need to know how to record these types of videos. The most common problems that I run into while I'm trying to record these videos is that my hand is shaking, or the pages aren't flipping uniformly, or the lighting and overall setup of the whole video just doesn't look as pretty as everybody else's. So after struggling with it a lot, here are some tips and tricks that I have so that you can up your page flipping video game. Okay, tip number one, you want to record in a place that has good lighting. Number 2, you wanna record on a flat or hard surface. Um, whether that's a countertop or. I have this little wood piece, and I'm going to put my blanket over it. All right, we're gonna be using this hardcover book, The Wrong Woman by Leanne Cal Sparks. Okay? And you can hold the phone directly above, um, or you can hold it at an angle. Whatever you think looks best. Now, if you have a shaky hand like I do, you might wanna use some separate tools. Well, I would suggest investing in either a ring light or this one that I have pictured. If you have a Shaky hand. That's not within your budget right now. I would suggest getting something simpler, like a pop socket or some sort of grip on the back of your phone case so that you're able to hold your phone more steady. First you're going to wanna open your book. And I literally go and I grab all the pages I like to record in my camera app, and then I will paste it into TikTok. That I can reuse the same video over and over again. As slowly as possible. Just start flipping them, and you can go in as close as you want or keep it zoomed out. Just gonna try to go as slowly as possible, because you can always speed up the video or slow it down to whatever length you need your teaser to be at. Going slow normally helps to make it more uniform. As you're flipping it, it's obviously not going to be perfect. And take it towards the end, as I'm doing with a hardcover, I just like to flip it over and then, like, zoom in or zoom out a little bit. There you have it. Now you have a video that you can use over and over and over again for your teaser videos. So I hope that that helped. Bye.

voice_to_text: Bueno, para negar la realidad, me terminé un Sketchbook que tenía desde 2019 que pasó por medio de la pandemia. Ya ni me acuerdo qué pasó en esos años. * ruidos * Prefiero no acordarme eh. Bueno, y acá hay como una mezcolanza de cosas. Hay desafíos, hay como memes de DeviantArt, cosas random eh. Dibuja esto en tu estilo. Sirena, se puede ver cuando salió Pokémon, cuando salió dinosaurio (del documental) Después, a partir de acá son todas medio que cosas de rol, cosas de bueno, acá nada que ver. Pero bueno, eh, intento de escenita, cuando ganó Argentina, perros dragones y acá personajecitos de rol  acá un cómic que me pidieron sobre más personajes y todo rol. Y bueno, la sigue la onda y a partir de acá son como chibis de eso y personajes míos. Estos últimos son personajes míos y todos tienen como altos mambos, -censurando a uno- Y bueno,  coso, están ahí

 Book link:  https://books2read.com/Risas-Destiny
 Book two live
 Blurb:
 Are you ready to enter the darkness?
 
 Risa Nightshade’s life has gone from bad to worse. First, she was separated from her twin, then her parents perished in a terrible fire, leaving her all alone. Except, of course, for the village filled with humans… Who hate her.
 
 The reason her family was taken from her resides in that village, but change is coming in the form of the Great Dragon, the guardian of the village, who has taken her as his own. 
 
 Can those from her past come together to keep Risa safe and find out what really happened to her family or will hidden secrets and unknown enemies burn the world down around them? 
 
 Are you ready to come out into the light if hope holds?
